narrative:
Cheviot City has 6,049 registered voters, with 65.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.6 percentage points.
